title: astragaloides cicera
intro: Astragaloides cicera, also known as Cicera or Cicera bean, is a type of plant that belongs to the Fabaceae family, which includes legumes. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and expectorant, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Astragaloides cicera is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
